'''dadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deasoil|deasoil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deasoil|deasoil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dadate|dadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dadatesher|dadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadatesherĂ«m|dadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadatero|dadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dadateshĂ«|dadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadateshĂ«m|dadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadatero|gokidadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidadateshĂ«|gokidadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadateshĂ«m|gokidadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godadankerom|godadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godadankeshĂ«|godadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadankeshĂ«m|godadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godadankeya|godadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadaterom|dadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadatemu|dadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dadateya|dadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadaterom|gokidadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadatemu|gokidadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidadateya|gokidadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dadadate|dadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dadadatesher|dadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadadatesherĂ«m|dadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadadatero|dadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dadadateshĂ«|dadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadadateshĂ«m|dadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadadatero|gokidadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidadadateshĂ«|gokidadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadadateshĂ«m|gokidadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godadadankerom|godadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godadadankeshĂ«|godadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadadankeshĂ«m|godadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godadadankeya|godadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadadaterom|dadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadadatemu|dadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dadadateya|dadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadadaterom|gokidadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadadatemu|gokidadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidadadateya|gokidadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠte|dĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠtesher|dĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠtero|dĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdĂŠtero|gokidĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠdĂŠnkerom|godĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠdĂŠnkeya|godĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠterom|dĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠtemu|dĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠdĂŠteya|dĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdĂŠterom|gokidĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdĂŠteya|gokidĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafdafte|dafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafdaftesher|dafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafdaftesherĂ«m|dafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafdaftero|dafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafdafteshĂ«|dafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafdafteshĂ«m|dafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafdaftero|gokidafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafdafteshĂ«|gokidafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafdafteshĂ«m|gokidafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafdafnkerom|godafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafdafnkeshĂ«|godafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafdafnkeshĂ«m|godafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafdafnkeya|godafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafdafterom|dafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafdaftemu|dafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafdafteya|dafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafdafterom|gokidafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafdaftemu|gokidafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafdafteya|gokidafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
